APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALISON H. HONG OF SEYFARTH SHAW LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-397-2823 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT INSIKT, INC.'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Special Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents, And Attendance And Testimony At Deposition, Or, In The Alternative, For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alison H. Hong, of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, Tel. 415.397.2823, for defendants Insikt, Inc.;
No other appearances.

Ruling: DEFENDANT INSIKT, INC. Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Special Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents, And Attendance And Testimony At Deposition, Or, In The Alternative, For Terminating Sanctions is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $4,000. to defendant. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Mark LeHocky; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Set For Trial On Aug-07-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
